---
title: "test_muninn_real_empire.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\quarantine\test_muninn_real_empire.py"
loc: 15
complexity: 3
logic_score: 7.92
style_score: 4.04
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 3.00
---

## Intent
The `test_muninn_real_empire.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on test_sprt_validator_stable, test_sprt_validator_flaky, test_sprt_validator_continue. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via test_sprt_validator_stable, test_sprt_validator_flaky, test_sprt_validator_continue. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.9/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.0/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 5 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [src.sentinel.muninn](file://src.sentinel.muninn)

### Exports
- `test_sprt_validator_stable`
- `test_sprt_validator_flaky`
- `test_sprt_validator_continue`
